finding_results.notes: Roughened the Marcus exchange across four turns. Line 91: cough now breaks his sentence mid-delivery ('Of course she — yeah.'), body interrupts before he can finish the thought. Line 95: replaced aphoristic 'I can fall in the right direction' with uncertain 'I don't know. Probably.' followed by a failed attempt to stand and profane fragment ('Shit. Help me up.') — body interrupts action, casual register restored. Line 99: HVAC regret speech broken by syntax collapse ('I should've put in a manual — the fucking HVAC.'), followed by technical detail in casual register ('Made it real clean'), then a second cough bends him into the wall before the bitter fragment 'Too clean.' Line 103: replaced 'Yeah. I know.' with 'I know.' plus physical action (damp handprint on wall), removing the extra padding. Marcus now has four turns interrupted by body or dropped syntax, profanity in two turns, and no standalone aphorisms. Noor's 'That helps a lot now' was already sardonic-functional rather than thesis-like and was preserved.

summary: Single finding addressed: Marcus's dialogue in the stairwell descent exchange was roughened to restore his casual, profane, physically fragmenting voice under withdrawal pressure. Replaced the polished quip and clean HVAC regret speech with body-interrupted syntax, profanity, and technical detail delivered through physical distress. No lines in the exchange now read as aphorisms when lifted from context. Noor's existing sardonic register was preserved unchanged. No collateral changes to other scenes. Heading contract, continuity, temperature-drop setup, and all must-land beats preserved.
